mapper.insert: INSERT INTO return_record (return_no, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, return_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{returnNo}, #{afterSalesId}, #{afterSalesNo}, #{returnStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE return_record SET logistics_company = #{logisticsCompany}, logistics_no = #{logisticsNo}, return_status = #{returnStatus}, shipped_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE return_record SET return_status = #{returnStatus}, receiver_id = #{receiverId}, receiver_remark = #{receiverRemark}, received_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
